ChallengeRequest.description:
Request body for provisioning a YubiKey challenge.
IV-205: deny_unknown_fields prevents unexpected fields in external input.

officer_id.description: Officer identifier expecting to answer the challenge.

ChallengeResponse.description: Response payload containing the generated challenge material.

challenge.description: Hex-encoded challenge bytes delivered to the client device.

expires_at.description: Absolute expiration timestamp for the challenge.

Authorizer.description:
Standardized authentication envelope shared by officers and clients.
IV-205: deny_unknown_fields prevents unexpected fields in external input.

challengeId.description: Challenge identifier required for YubiKey flows.

hmac.description: Hex-encoded HMAC over the canonical payload.

keyId.description: Identifier of the key used to produce the HMAC.

nonce.description: Cryptographic nonce for replay protection (64 hex chars / 256 bits, mandatory).

timestamp.description:
Unix timestamp in SECONDS included in the canonical message.
Window 30 seconds (compared against provii-verifier's 300-second
window in its own HMAC verification). See `validate_timestamp`
in `session.rs` and `TIMESTAMP_WINDOW_SECONDS = 30`.

CreateAttestationRequest.description:
Request payload for creating a DOB attestation.

# Security (ASVS 5.0 / MASVS 2.0)
- Officer authentication via HMAC (same as existing issuance flow)
- Ed25519 signing key retrieved from secure storage
- Attestation signed with issuer-specific key

IV-205: deny_unknown_fields prevents unexpected fields in external input.

dob_days.description:
Days since Unix epoch representing date of birth.
Negative values represent dates before 1970-01-01 (e.g. -25000 ~ 1901).

CreateAttestationResponse.description: Response payload for successful attestation creation.

expires_at.description: Unix timestamp when this attestation expires (1 hour from creation).

issuer_id.description: Issuer identifier that signed this attestation.

key_id.description: ID of the newly rotated key

StatusTokenAuth.name: X-Status-Token

info.description: Privacy-preserving credential issuance service using blind attestation. Officers create attestations that users scan to receive credentials without revealing commitment data.

parameters.name: X-Status-Token

get.description: Interactive API documentation rendered from the OpenAPI specification

post.description:
Issues a credential using blind attestation. The user provides an attestation (from QR scan) and generates r_bits locally, ensuring the officer never sees the commitment C.

**Forward-compatibility policy:** the request envelope does not apply `additionalProperties: false`. Unknown top-level fields are silently dropped on the server so future envelope additions roll out without a wire-format break. Field-level validation (length caps, base64 charset, schema URL form) is enforced individually via the `attestation`, `r_bits`, `schema`, and `validity_days` constraints below; the `validate` attributes on the Rust `BlindIssuanceRequest` type are the source of truth.

schema.description: Forward-compatible envelope. `additionalProperties: true` documents the intentional omission of `serde(deny_unknown_fields)` on the Rust type so new fields can land without breaking existing clients.

r_bits.description: Base64url-encoded random bits for commitment blinding (generated by wallet)

schema.description: Optional schema URL override. Defaults to provii.age/0.

validity_days.description: Optional credential validity in days, bounded by issuer policy. Defaults to 36500 (lifetime).

SignedCredentialHeader.description: Public header returned after a commitment is signed.

c_bytes.description: Commitment bytes included in the credential.

kid.description: Key identifier used to produce the signature.

schema.description: Schema identifier describing the credential contents.
Response payload for successful blind issuance.

credential.description: The signed credential header containing the commitment and RedJubjub signature.

schema.title: BlindIssuanceResponse

400.description: Bad request - invalid attestation or r_bits

get.description: Redirects to the canonical /.well-known/jwks.json location with a 301 Moved Permanently response.
